description: Human-owned Plan 01 migration evidence for the tracked Claude legacy surface. Update only after intentional review.

full_claude_tree.description: Every tracked file under .claude/. This complete-tree evidence closes category gaps while the seven migration category counts remain independently fixed.

hooks.description: All tracked policy hooks under .claude/hooks/, excluding _lib.sh; every entry is executable.

code_templates.description: All tracked code-template files under templates/.

legacy_product_positioning.policy: Plan 01 preserves the active cloud-nine-unity identity until the public rename in Plan 06. Historical paths and explicit legacy-marker test occurrences are permitted; every other current occurrence is grandfathered exactly, and new active occurrences or paths require an intentional baseline update.

# cloud-nine-unity — repo guide
# Contributing to cloud-nine-unity
cloud-nine-unity is a **standalone Unity 6 toolkit for Claude Code**. It vendors
`cloud-nine-unity` uses **one** MCP server: CoplayDev's open-source **Unity MCP** bridge.
# cloud-nine-unity
between the `cloud-nine-unity:generated` markers is refreshed — your prose is left byte-for-byte.
cd cloud-nine-unity
git clone https://github.com/OmerZeyveli/cloud-nine-unity.git
### Design and production agents (cloud-nine-unity overlay)
5. **Design and Production Agents** (cloud-nine-unity overlay) -- author documentation under `docs/`, no code, no MCP
_None._ cloud-nine-unity targets PC/console only, so there is no platform-switching layer. Platform

Test that every inventory SHA matches, every inventory path exists, and no additional file appears in a listed category without an inventory update. Also scan tracked product text and fail on new product-positioning uses of `cloud-nine-unity`; permit historical occurrences only in `MERGE-NOTES.md`, `CREDITS.md`, `provenance.tsv`, migration fixtures, and legacy-marker tests.
